name: @mni-ml/framework
description: A TypeScript ML framework with Rust native backends (CPU, CUDA, WebGPU) — autograd, tensors, and neural network training at GPU speed.

scripts.build:native: cd src/native && cargo build --release --features cpu && cp target/release/libmni_framework_native.dylib mni-framework-native.darwin-arm64.node
scripts.build:native:cuda: cd src/native && cargo build --release --no-default-features --features cuda && cp target/release/libmni_framework_native.so mni-framework-native.linux-x64-gnu.node
scripts.build:native:webgpu: cd src/native && cargo build --release --no-default-features --features webgpu && cp target/release/libmni_framework_native.dylib mni-framework-native.darwin-arm64.node
scripts.build:all: npm run build:native && npm run build
